creator: bzeeb-lists@lists.zabbadoz.net
text:
On Fri, 7 Jan 2011, Jason Helfman wrote:

> Update copyright years for some books.

I am not sure what the policy is in doc@ land but I guess the first
noticable change should probably do it there and not in advanced if
they are not updated?

/bz
